failure_reason: Declared the BML/BMF/Form native compiler north star, floor, and next step in Form-readable documentation and executable BML compiler cells. The walked step makes unsupported BML-to-Hati lowering observable: unsupported images carry reason strings and bml-hati-compile-program, bml-hati-table-file, and bml-hati-run-value return BML-HATI-UNSUPPORTED markers instead of a valid zero result. Existing native binary probe and compiler proof still pass; new floor proof returns 14.
